agent-A1-pulse.summary: All 17 daemon.ts import errors resolved. Restored deleted __companions__/ directory from git. Added re-export for buildExecutionHarness from companion in execution-harness.ts. All imports verified via ts-node transpile-only. Pre-existing issue in execution-harness-core.companion.ts (vestigial companion with missing internal imports) is not a daemon.ts regression — does not block daemon execution.

agent-A3-auth.summary: Magic Link fully implemented — backend endpoints, email service, DTOs, Prisma model, frontend API client, proxy routes, /magic-link page, auth screen UI all wired. No gaps found. Lint passes, typecheck clean.

agent-A4-workspaces.summary: CRUD validated: DELETE endpoint added to workspace.controller.ts + workspace.service.ts. Type fix in provider-status.util.ts (lastUpdated null→undefined). Workspace isolation verified via resolveWorkspaceId in all endpoints. No prismaAny usage. Frontend API client matches backend. 70 tests pass, no type errors in module.

agent-A6-dashboard.summary: Dashboard already connected to real backend — HomeView uses useDashboardHome() hook → GET /dashboard/home → real Prisma queries. Zero Math.random(), zero hardcoded arrays, zero localStorage for business data. Fixed getDashboardStats() type in lib/api/dashboard.ts to match backend response (was {revenue,leads} — now {contacts,campaigns,flows,messages,deliveryRate,readRate,errorRate,activeConversations,healthScore,avgLatency,flowStats,billingSuspended}). Backend build passes. Frontend typecheck has pre-existing errors in product-import.ts (unrelated).

agent-A7-analytics.summary: 3 fake-data gaps closed: (1) Smart Time: backend getBestTime() shape updated to match frontend SmartTimeData — added peakHour, peakDay, heatmap, bestHours[], bestDays[]; frontend useSmartTime now receives real heatmap data. Tests: 4/4 pass. (2) Full Report: useReports hook now maps backend FullReportResponse {kpi,revenueChart,topProducts,...} to legacy ReportResponse shape; EngajamentoTab shows real data (messages=aiPerformance.totalMessages, leads=kpi.totalLeads, revenue=kpi.totalRevenue). Typecheck: clean. (3) AI Report: hardcoded fake values (avgResponseTime, resolutionRate, csat, etc) replaced — avgResponseTime computed from real message intervals, unavailable fields set to null. No Math.random(), no hardcoded arrays, no localStorage for business data. Backend lint: clean. Frontend typecheck: clean (only pre-existing EmptyStates.test.tsx error remains). Build: backend typecheck passes (pre-existing whatsapp errors). Smart-time tests: 4/4 pass. Analytics service spec: pre-existing failure (missing CacheService mock from prior modification). Graph bridge: alive at :37779/status.

agent-A9-whatsapp.summary: WhatsApp Core audit: pipeline is production-grade at 95% as claimed. No critical gaps found.

agent-A10-checkout.summary: Checkout flow audited end-to-end. 16 suites, 59/59 pass. No critical gaps found.

agent-A11-flows.summary: Flows/Autopilot audit complete. Added handlers for 'ai', 'action', 'input', 'start', 'end' node types in flow-node-executor.companion.ts. Fixed dead 'Testar' button. Fixed createFromTemplate URL mismatch.

agent-A12-billing.summary: Billing+Wallet hardening audit. 4 critical fixes applied: (1) cancelSubscription now respects Stripe cancel_at_period_end — sets cancelAtPeriodEnd:true and preserves status instead of immediate CANCELED. (2) fulfillCheckout wrapped in $transaction for atomic subscription upsert+plan activation. (3) Webhook idempotency via WebhookEvent model (provider+externalId unique constraint, status tracking). (4) syncSubscriptionStatus preserves existing plan name instead of overwriting with Stripe price ID. Wallet verified: all 4 mutation methods (creditFromWebhook, chargeForUsage, settleUsageCharge, refundUsageCharge) use $transaction with ReadCommitted — correct. All money amounts are bigint in schema and service layer — correct. Idempotency via @@unique([referenceType, referenceId, type]) — correct. Tests: 13 suites, 150/151 pass. Typecheck: pre-existing TS2564 errors only (DTO strictPropertyInitialization).

agent-A14-inbox.summary: Inbox audit: NO fake data. Backend InboxService uses real Prisma (conversation.findMany, message.findMany, $transaction). Frontend InboxWorkspace uses real API calls via listConversations/getConversationMessages/apiFetch. chat-container.tsx localStorage is session-only (guest ID/onboarding). No fake/mock/dummy placeholders in inbox pipeline. Backend build: inbox compiles clean (2 errors in checkout — yellow zone). Graph bridge alive at :37779. No changes needed.

agent-A34-e2e.summary: E2E infrastructure validated: Playwright 1.59.1 (e2e/package.json), 2 projects (chromium + visual), 26 spec files in e2e/specs/, 2 visual specs, 3 root-level specs. ~73 chromium tests + ~48 visual tests listed via --list. New specs validated: product-catalog-flow.spec.ts (10 tests, CRUD catalog lifecycle) and whatsapp-message-flow.spec.ts (9 tests, send/inbox/templates/session). Both follow established patterns (ensureE2EAdmin, graceful status assertions, serial mode). Critical flows covered: Auth (auth-flows, customer-auth-shell), Login→Flow→Execute (critical-flow), Checkout (customer-purchase-journey, public-checkout-smoke, customer-product-and-checkout), WhatsApp (whatsapp-message-flow, whatsapp-qr, marketing-whatsapp-flow, customer-whatsapp-and-inbox), Products (product-catalog-flow, product-creation, products-card-layout-audit), Billing (billing-plan-lifecycle, billing-reactivation, billing-suspension, system-payment-reconciliation), KYC (settings-kyc), Flows (flow-wait, flows-auth), Autopilot (autopilot-run), Worker (worker-health), Kloel chat (kloel-chat-composer-real, kloel-stream-smoke), Theme (theme-toggle-persistence), Mobile (mobile-surface-audit). Visual: critical-flows.spec.ts (14 routes × 3 viewports = 42 baselines), kloel-chat.spec.ts. Gaps: No E2E for backend-only modules still pending (campaigns, affiliate, partnerships, team, api-keys, notifications, marketing, scrapers, meta, growth, pipeline, public-api, observability) — these lack frontend surfaces and their agents are still pending in Wave 2 grid.
